title: Pyrus hupehensis
taxonomy: Pyrus hupehensis is classified in the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically in the family Rosaceae. It belongs to the order Rosales and the genus Pyrus. It is a deciduous tree that is often cultivated in gardens for its showy white flowers and attractive fall foliage.
